summary: Phase 7 - Championships Expanded testing completed. Backend: 17/17 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All championship features working correctly including format selection (5x5/3x3), convocation type (manual/automatica), add match, edit match, delete match, update result, and standings.
seed_data_creation: TEST_Phase7_Championship created during testing with format=5x5 and convocation_type=automatica
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 Championships Expanded fully functional. Championships page at /championships supports: format selection (5x5/3x3), convocation type (manual/automatica). Championship detail page supports: add match, edit match (opponent, date, location, venue), delete match, update result (scores, bonus, penalty), standings table. All CRUD operations working via API endpoints.

championships_page_loads.description: Championships page loads at /championships with data-testid='championships-page'

create_championship_with_format.description: Create championship dialog includes format field (5x5/3x3) with data-testid='championship-format-select'

create_championship_with_convocation_typ.description: Create championship dialog includes convocation_type field (manual/automatica) with data-testid='championship-convocation-select'

championship_card_badges.description: Championship cards show format badge (5x5/3x3) and convocation badge (Auto/Manual)

championship_detail_badges.description: Championship detail page shows format and convocation type badges

add_match.description: Add match dialog with opponent, date, location, venue fields works correctly

edit_match.description: Edit match dialog allows updating opponent, date, location, venue

delete_match.description: Delete match button removes match and shows 'Jogo eliminado!' toast

update_match_result.description: Result dialog allows setting home/away scores, bonus and penalty points

standings_table.description: Standings tab shows classification table with points, goals, etc.

backend_put_match.description: Updates match details (opponent, date, location, venue)

backend_delete_match.description: Deletes match and associated event/attendance records
